description: OpenLink Software provides data connectivity and knowledge graph products including Virtuoso, OPAL, and related data access tools. Its public site links to product documentation and demos, and the documented developer-facing API surface found here is the OSDB REST API.
summary: OpenLink Software exposes one documented public HTTP API surface: the OSDB REST API v1 at `https://osdb.openlinksw.com/osdb`, with a published OpenAPI spec and no documented authentication requirement.
